values.content:
You are a call analysis specialist for a premium HVAC AI receptionist service. Analyze the call transcript and extract ALL relevant data.

Return a JSON object with these fields:

CALLER INFORMATION:
- caller_name (string): Full name if provided, empty string if not
- caller_phone (string): Phone number if stated, empty string if not
- caller_address (string): Service address if provided, empty string if not
- caller_sentiment (string): happy, neutral, frustrated, angry, anxious, grateful

CALL CLASSIFICATION:
- call_type (string): new_booking, reschedule, cancellation, emergency, callback, existing_customer, general_question, spam, transfer_request
- service_requested (string): Specific service discussed
- urgency (string): low, medium, high, emergency
- job_type (string): Repair, Maintenance, Installation, Estimate, Emergency, Inspection, General, Other

BOOKING DATA:
- booking_attempted (boolean): Did the agent try to book?
- booking_success (boolean): Was an appointment confirmed?
- appointment_date (string): YYYY-MM-DD or empty string
- appointment_time_window (string): morning or afternoon or empty string
- job_type_booked (string): Service booked or empty string
- reschedule_or_cancel (string): reschedule, cancel, or neither

LEAD QUALIFICATION:
- lead_score (integer 0-10): 0=spam, 1-3=low, 4-6=moderate, 7-8=high, 9-10=hot. Booking made=9-10. Booking attempted but failed=7-8.
- is_hot_lead (boolean): true if lead_score >= 7
- is_lead (boolean): true if any service need expressed

ADDITIONAL:
- vulnerable_occupant (boolean): elderly, disabled, young children mentioned
- transfer_attempted (boolean): Was transfer attempted?
- transfer_success (boolean or null): true/false/null
- summary (string): 1-3 sentence summary with outcome and action needed
- notes (string): Important additional details

Return ONLY valid JSON. No markdown, no backticks.

parameters.jsCode:
const d = $input.first().json;

const body = {
  agent_id: d.agent_id || '',
  call_id: d.call_id || '',
  company_name: d.company_name || '',
  call_tier: 'premium',
  duration_seconds: d.duration_seconds || 0,
  call_status: d.disconnection_reason || 'completed',
  call_successful: d.booking_success || d.is_lead || false,
  summary: d.summary || '',
  caller_name: d.caller_name || '',
  caller_phone: d.caller_phone || '',
  caller_address: d.caller_address || '',
  caller_sentiment: d.caller_sentiment || '',
  lead_score: d.lead_score || 0,
  is_lead: d.is_lead || false,
  is_hot_lead: d.is_hot_lead || false,
  job_type: d.job_type || '',
  urgency: d.urgency || '',
  vulnerable_occupant: d.vulnerable_occupant || false,
  notes: d.notes || '',
  service_requested: d.service_requested || '',
  booking_attempted: d.booking_attempted || false,
  booking_success: d.booking_success || false,
  appointment_date: d.appointment_date || null,
  appointment_time: d.appointment_time_window || '',
  job_type_booked: d.job_type_booked || '',
  reschedule_requested: d.reschedule_or_cancel === 'reschedule',
  cancellation_requested: d.reschedule_or_cancel === 'cancel',
  call_type: d.call_type || '',
  transfer_attempted: d.transfer_attempted || false,
  transfer_success: d.transfer_success === true ? true : d.transfer_success === false ? false : null,
  from_number: d.from_number || '',
  notification_type: d.notification_type || '',
  notification_priority: d.notification_priority || '',
  is_repeat_caller: d.is_repeat_caller || false,
  repeat_call_count: d.repeat_call_count || 0
};

const response = await this.helpers.httpRequest({
  method: 'POST',
  url: 'https://hgheyqwnrcvwtgngqdnq.supabase.co/rest/v1/hvac_premium_call_log',
  headers: {
    'apikey': 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJzdXBhYmFzZSIsInJlZiI6ImhnaGV5cXducmN2d3RnbmdxZG5xIiwicm9sZSI6InNlcnZpY2Vfcm9sZSIsImlhdCI6MTc3NDI5NTM1MiwiZXhwIjoyMDg5ODcxMzUyfQ.PENNZ2K5syVFyU3Yn6FfYZP1JEtmanlV6nTrlGaeqsg',
    'Authorization': 'Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJzdXBhYmFzZSIsInJlZiI6ImhnaGV5cXducmN2d3RnbmdxZG5xIiwicm9sZSI6InNlcnZpY2Vfcm9sZSIsImlhdCI6MTc3NDI5NTM1MiwiZXhwIjoyMDg5ODcxMzUyfQ.PENNZ2K5syVFyU3Yn6FfYZP1JEtmanlV6nTrlGaeqsg',
    'Content-Type': 'application/json',
    'Prefer': 'return=representation'
  },
  body: body,
  json: true
});

// Pass through all original data plus the Supabase response
return { ...d, _supabase_logged: true, _supabase_id: Array.isArray(response) && response[0] ? response[0].id : null };
